title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAGNAY, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2930 / 57 OG No. 6, 1010 (February 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2778, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAGNAY, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The following sitios in the Municipality of Sagnay, Province of Camarines Sur, are constituted as distinct and independent barrios of said municipality, to wit:

The sitios of Aniog and Bolo, to be known as the barrio of Aniog; and

The sitios of Bognalon, Suboc, Oyagno, Amislag and Cagbalogo, to be known as the barrio of Bognalon.

SEC. 2 This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
